title: 1.1: Exports createNodeGraphFrames as a named function from packages/grafana-o11y-ds-frontend/src/createNodeGraphFrames.ts
1.2: Defines createNodeGraphFrames to accept a DataFrame parameter and return DataFrame[]
1.3: Includes trace-to-graph conversion logic that maps span data to node entries with standard node graph fields (id, title, subTitle, mainStat, secondaryStat, color) within the shared package
1.4: Includes trace-to-graph conversion logic that maps parent-child span relationships to edge entries with standard edge fields (id, source, target) within the shared package
1.5: Updates the barrel export in packages/grafana-o11y-ds-frontend/src/index.ts to re-export from the module containing createNodeGraphFrames
1.6: Updates the import in public/app/plugins/datasource/tempo/resultTransformer.ts to import createNodeGraphFrames from @grafana/o11y-ds-frontend
1.7: Replaces both createGraphFrames invocations in resultTransformer.ts with createNodeGraphFrames in the transformFromOTLP and transformTrace functions
3.1: Removes the createGraphFrames function definition and its private helpers (convertTraceToGraph, findTraceDuration) and associated type definitions (Row, Node, Edge) from graphTransform.ts
3.2: Removes the unused import of helper functions (getNonOverlappingDuration, getStats, makeFrames, makeSpanMap) from @grafana/o11y-ds-frontend in graphTransform.ts
4.1: Removes or modifies the mapPromMetricsToServiceMap function or its related metric constants in graphTransform.ts
4.2: Modifies any file with a .test.ts or .test.tsx extension
4.3: Alters the function signatures or exported behavior of existing shared utilities (getNonOverlappingDuration, getStats, makeFrames, makeSpanMap) in the @grafana/o11y-ds-frontend package
